LSE-HS9-L4-6501000-HSALG1-CSR-IMR-02 • HS Algebra I • Graphing Functions

The Visa Jump

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Explain what the girl describes, why that connects to her uncertainty, and what choice she is working through. Use what you heard to support your answer.
